data.title: SEC Explores Regulatory Sandbox for Digital Assets Innovation
data.description:
Acting SEC Chair proposes a regulatory sandbox for digital assets, encouraging innovation in tokenized securities trading.

data.title: Will Ethereum Price crash More Next week??
data.description:
S. -based ETFs linked to it have seen outflows for seven weeks in a row. Just this week, nine Ethereum ETFs lost a total of $82
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/will-ethereum-price-crash-more-next-week/

data.title: Bitcoin Massively Outperforming S&P 500 Amid Risk-Asset Panic, Says Analyst Jamie Coutts – Here’s His Outlook
data.description:
Real Vision’s chief crypto analyst, Jamie Coutts, is highlighting the outperformance of Bitcoin (BTC) amid a correction experienced by stocks and crypto assets.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/04/12/bitcoin-massively-outperforming-sp-500-amid-risk-asset-panic-says-analyst-jamie-coutts-heres-his-outlook/

data.title: Young South Korean investors ditch local stocks for US stocks, cryptocurrenci
data.description:
Young South Korean investors are now ditching local stocks and turning to markets in the United States and digital assets. According to reports, the number of young investors still active in the domestic stock markets is seriously plummeting, a development that has caused mixed reactions across the stock market in the country. According to data […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/south-korean-ditch-local-stocks-for-crypto/

data.title: U.S. Exempts Chinese Tech Imports from Reciprocal Tariffs
data.description:
U. S. exempts key tech products from China tariffs, easing trade impact.
source: https://coincu.com/331757-us-exempts-chinese-tech-tariffs

data.title: Wayfinder (PROMPT) broke through 0.6USDT in the short term and is now trading at 0.608USDT
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News OKX market shows that Wayfinder (PROMPT) once broke through 0.6 USDT in the short term and is now at 0.608USDT, setting a new record high.

data.title: Bitcoin whales absorb market pressure, but is a parabolic run REALLY coming?
data.description:
Bitcoin rose by 11% to $83,500, driven by whales and long-term holders.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/bitcoin-whales-absorb-market-pressure-but-is-a-parabolic-run-really-coming/

data.title: The transaction volume of USD1, the US dollar stablecoin launched by WLFI, has exceeded 44.91 million US dollars
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to CoinGecko data, the transaction volume of USD1, the US dollar stablecoin launched by Trump's crypto project WLFI, has exceeded 44.91 million US dollars. 
Earlier news, DWF Labs has begun to add USD1 liquidity on Ethereum and BSC chains.

data.title: Billionaire Draper Doubles Down on Bullish Outlook for Bitcoin, Sends Message to Naysayers
data.description:
Billionaire Tim Draper has taken to X to remind market onlookers of his position on unconventional emerging technologies like artificial intelligence and cryptos.
source: https://zycrypto.com/billionaire-draper-doubles-down-on-bullish-outlook-for-bitcoin-sends-message-to-naysayers/

data.title: Ton coin Price Prediction: Indicators Point To Recovery
data.description:
As seen on the broader market, Ton coin ($TON) has recently been dealing with a challenging environment. However, analysts are looking for a potential turnaround after a substantial price fall. According to the latest data, Toncoin has dropped by over 1% in the past 24 hours
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/12/ton-coin-price-prediction-indicators-point-to-recovery/
